Column.Label: controller.form_submit_count(cx), email => controller.form_email_value(cx), error => format!("{:?}", controller.form_email_error(cx)))} muted /> controller.checkbox_value(cx), switch => controller.switch_value(cx), radio => controller.radio_value(cx), slider => format!("{:.1}", controller.slider_value(cx)))} muted /> controller.toast_count(cx), locale => controller.current_locale(cx).tag())} muted />
